votes.reason: The Python code implements the factorial and brazilian_factorial functions with the exact same recursive structure and base cases as the Coq definitions.

The Python code directly translates the Coq definitions. fact computes n! recursively, brazilian_factorial computes the product of factorials from n down to 1, and special_factorial_spec checks if ans equals brazilian_factorial(n). Both implementations produce the same concrete results for all natural number inputs.
